summary: Iteration 33 - Quick Resolve & TeamProfilePage Testing Complete. All new features verified working: 1) Quick Resolve button on admin dashboard with purple gradient card and Brain icon, 2) POST /api/admin/quick-resolve-all endpoint returns proper result structure, 3) Quick Resolve shows result summary with resolved/skipped/errors counts, 4) SearchPage -> Click team -> Shows comprehensive TeamProfilePage, 5) TeamProfilePage has all required sections (hero, stats, history, Hindi, key players, fun facts, matches), 6) Back button returns to SearchPage, 7) Bottom nav search button navigates to SearchPage.
critical_code_review_comments: AdminDashboard.jsx: Quick Resolve card well-implemented with purple gradient, Brain icon, confirmation dialog, and result summary display
admin.py: POST /admin/quick-resolve-all endpoint properly processes all active contests and returns detailed results
TeamProfilePage.jsx: Comprehensive team profiles with bilingual content (English + Hindi), all 10 IPL teams supported
SearchPage.jsx: Clean integration with TeamProfilePage, 5-column team grid, search functionality working
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features verified: 1) Quick Resolve button on admin dashboard - purple gradient card with Brain icon, shows 'Resolve All' button, displays result summary with Resolved/Skipped/Errors counts after clicking. 2) TeamProfilePage shows comprehensive team profiles with: hero banner, quick stats (Titles/Captain/Matches/Founded), Championship Titles, Team Info card, History & Legacy essay, Hindi section, Key Players horizontal scroll, Did You Know? fun facts, and team matches. 3) Back button returns to SearchPage. 4) Bottom nav search button (center protruding red button) navigates to SearchPage with all 10 IPL teams.

features_verified.quick_resolve_button: Purple gradient card with Brain icon on Admin Dashboard - WORKING
features_verified.quick_resolve_endpoint: POST /api/admin/quick-resolve-all returns message, total_resolved, total_skipped, total_errors, results - WORKING
features_verified.quick_resolve_result_summary: Shows 3 stat boxes (Resolved/Skipped/Errors) with counts and per-contest details - WORKING
features_verified.search_page_team_click: Clicking team logo (e.g., CSK) opens TeamProfilePage - WORKING
features_verified.team_profile_hero_banner: Hero banner with team logo, name, Hindi name, city, founded year - WORKING
features_verified.team_profile_stats: Quick stats strip: Titles, Captain, Matches, Founded - WORKING
features_verified.team_profile_title_years: Championship Titles section with trophy icons and years - WORKING
features_verified.team_profile_team_info: Team Info card: Home Ground, Captain, Coach, Owner, Motto - WORKING
features_verified.team_profile_history: History & Legacy essay with 'Read Full Story' button - WORKING
features_verified.team_profile_hindi: Hindi section with Hindi text content - WORKING
features_verified.team_profile_key_players: Key Players horizontal scroll with player initials - WORKING
features_verified.team_profile_fun_facts: Did You Know? section with numbered fun facts - WORKING
features_verified.team_profile_matches: Team matches section showing relevant matches - WORKING
features_verified.team_profile_back_button: Back to Search button returns to SearchPage - WORKING
features_verified.bottom_nav_search: Center protruding red search button navigates to SearchPage - WORKING
